all.en: This report summarizes our sales performance for the third quarter.
all.zh: 本報告總結我們第三季的業務表現。

all.en: Total revenue reached eight point two million dollars this quarter.
all.zh: 本季總營收達到八百二十萬美元。

all.en: That figure represents a twelve percent increase over last year.
all.zh: 該數字較去年同期成長百分之十二。

all.en: The North American region delivered the strongest growth across all markets.
all.zh: 北美地區在所有市場中交出最強勁的成長。

all.en: Enterprise software accounted for sixty percent of total bookings.
all.zh: 企業軟體佔總簽約金額的百分之六十。

all.en: Our renewal rate climbed to ninety one percent this period.
all.zh: 本期續約率提升至百分之九十一。

all.en: Three new strategic accounts were added during the quarter.
all.zh: 本季新增三個策略級客戶。

all.en: Average deal size grew from forty five to fifty two thousand.
all.zh: 平均成交金額從四萬五千成長至五萬二千美元。

all.en: The sales cycle shortened by roughly nine days on average.
all.zh: 業務週期平均縮短約九天。

all.en: Marketing qualified leads contributed forty percent of closed deals.
all.zh: 行銷合格名單貢獻了百分之四十的成交案。

all.en: However, the European region missed its quota by eight percent.
all.zh: 然而歐洲地區未達標百分之八。

all.en: Currency fluctuations had a noticeable impact on reported revenue.
all.zh: 匯率波動對申報營收造成明顯影響。

all.en: We lost two large opportunities to a more aggressive competitor.
all.zh: 我們將兩個大型機會輸給了更積極的競爭對手。

all.en: The product team is reviewing feature gaps highlighted by lost deals.
all.zh: 產品團隊正在檢視流失案件凸顯的功能缺口。

all.en: Channel partners delivered twenty two percent of new logo revenue.
all.zh: 通路夥伴貢獻了百分之二十二的新客戶營收。

all.en: Direct sales remained the primary engine of enterprise expansion.
all.zh: 直銷仍是企業擴張的主要動能。

all.en: Customer satisfaction scores held steady at four point six out of five.
all.zh: 客戶滿意度穩定維持在五分之四點六。

all.en: The pipeline coverage for next quarter currently sits at three point one times.
all.zh: 下一季的 pipeline 覆蓋率目前為三點一倍。

all.en: We expect the upcoming product launch to accelerate fourth quarter bookings.
all.zh: 我們預期即將推出的產品將加速第四季簽約。

all.en: Hiring plans include five additional account executives in key territories.
all.zh: 招募計畫包含於關鍵區域增聘五名業務代表。

all.en: Training investment will focus on solution selling and discovery skills.
all.zh: 訓練投資將聚焦於解決方案銷售與需求探索技巧。

all.en: Risks include a possible economic slowdown affecting enterprise budgets.
all.zh: 風險包含可能的經濟放緩衝擊企業預算。

all.en: Overall, the quarter exceeded expectations despite regional headwinds.
all.zh: 整體而言，本季在區域逆風下仍超越預期。

all.en: We remain confident in meeting our annual revenue target.
all.zh: 我們仍有信心達成年度營收目標。

all.en: A detailed regional breakdown is attached as an appendix.
all.zh: 詳細的區域分析附於附錄中。
